features: Porto Hand Tied Florist Bags - Orange - Pack of 1
Perfect for floral hand tied arrangements, transporting flowers, bouquets, plants, gifts etc.
Made from a strong cardboard with an added piece of cardboard to the base
The porto bags have rope handles, also available in several vibrant colours.
description: A good quality porto bag with matching cord handles. Perfect for floral hand tied arrangements, bouquets, plants, gifts etc. Made from a strong cardboard with an added piece of cardboard to the base. Bags are supplied flat packed. Quick and easy crashlock construction with rigid baseboard Rope handles in coordinating colours Tall, rectangular, boutique-style bags Bag measures 19cm wide x 25cm high x 17cm deep Recyclable and biodegradable, coloured with soybean ink Flat-packed for convenient storage Colour: Orange Quantity: 1 Bag
